tasks.subject: Task 1: Dev tooling & hygiene (.gitignore, .editorconfig, Makefile)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Repo gains a Go .gitignore, .editorconfig, and a Makefile whose build/vet/test targets work.

**Files:** Create `.gitignore`, `.editorconfig`, `Makefile` (recipes tab-indented).

**Verify:** `make build && make vet && make test`; `git check-ignore bin/lazygh`. See plan Task 1 for exact contents.

```json:metadata
{"files": [".gitignore", ".editorconfig", "Makefile"], "verifyCommand": "make build && make vet && make test && git check-ignore bin/lazygh", "acceptanceCriteria": ["three files exist", "make build/vet/test succeed", "bin/ git-ignored"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: Lint gate — .golangci.yml + 5 staticcheck fixes
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Add golangci-lint v2 gate and make existing code pass (0 issues), tests green.

**Files:** Create `.golangci.yml`; modify `internal/tui/pr/pr.go` (LineUp->ScrollUp @124, LineDown->ScrollDown @134, WriteString+Sprintf->Fprintf @223); modify `internal/tui/repolist/repolist.go` (Fprintf @111,@115).

**Verify:** install golangci-lint v2.12.2; `golangci-lint run` -> 0 issues; `go test ./...` ok. Fixes pre-verified during planning. See plan Task 2.

```json:metadata
{"files": [".golangci.yml", "internal/tui/pr/pr.go", "internal/tui/repolist/repolist.go"], "verifyCommand": "export PATH=\"$(go env GOPATH)/bin:$PATH\"; golangci-lint run && go test ./...", "acceptanceCriteria": ["golangci-lint run 0 issues", "go test passes", "v2 schema config"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 3: CI workflow + Dependabot extension
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Add .github/workflows/ci.yml (test + lint jobs, SHA-pinned actions) and extend Dependabot to github-actions + grouping.

**Files:** Create `.github/workflows/ci.yml`; modify `.github/dependabot.yml`.

**Verify:** `actionlint`; `make build && make vet && make test && golangci-lint run`. Blocked by Tasks 1 (Makefile) and 2 (green lint). Pinned SHAs: checkout v7.0.0 9c091bb..., setup-go v6.5.0 924ae3a..., golangci-lint-action v9.3.0 ba0d7d2.... See plan Task 3.

```json:metadata
{"files": [".github/workflows/ci.yml", ".github/dependabot.yml"], "verifyCommand": "export PATH=\"$(go env GOPATH)/bin:$PATH\"; actionlint && make build && make vet && make test && golangci-lint run", "acceptanceCriteria": ["ci.yml test+lint jobs, correct triggers", "actions SHA-pinned", "dependabot 2 ecosystems + groups", "actionlint clean"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 4: Community-health files
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Add LICENSE, CONTRIBUTING, CODE_OF_CONDUCT, SECURITY — all reporting via GitHub, no email.

**Files:** Create `LICENSE` (MIT, 2026 Christopher R. Bilger), `CONTRIBUTING.md`, `CODE_OF_CONDUCT.md` (Contributor Covenant v2.1; contact = maintainer via GitHub), `SECURITY.md` (GitHub Private Vulnerability Reporting).

**Verify:** email-regex grep over the 4 files returns nothing. CoC fetched from contributor-covenant.org v2.1 with contact substitution. See plan Task 4.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["LICENSE", "CONTRIBUTING.md", "CODE_OF_CONDUCT.md", "SECURITY.md"], "verifyCommand": "grep -rIE '[A-Za-z0-9._%+-]+@[A-Za-z0-9.-]+\\.[A-Za-z]{2,}' LICENSE CONTRIBUTING.md CODE_OF_CONDUCT.md SECURITY.md; test $? -eq 1", "acceptanceCriteria": ["MIT license 2026 Christopher R. Bilger", "no email anywhere", "SECURITY=GitHub PVR, CoC=GitHub contact"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 5: GitHub templates & review routing
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Add issue templates (bug+feature), config.yml (blank issues disabled), PR template, CODEOWNERS.

**Files:** Create `.github/ISSUE_TEMPLATE/bug_report.md`, `.github/ISSUE_TEMPLATE/feature_request.md`, `.github/ISSUE_TEMPLATE/config.yml`, `.github/PULL_REQUEST_TEMPLATE.md`, `.github/CODEOWNERS`.

**Verify:** config.yml valid YAML; `grep -q '^\* @ChristopherBilg$' .github/CODEOWNERS`. See plan Task 5.

```json:metadata
{"files": [".github/ISSUE_TEMPLATE/bug_report.md", ".github/ISSUE_TEMPLATE/feature_request.md", ".github/ISSUE_TEMPLATE/config.yml", ".github/PULL_REQUEST_TEMPLATE.md", ".github/CODEOWNERS"], "verifyCommand": "grep -q '^\\* @ChristopherBilg$' .github/CODEOWNERS && echo OK", "acceptanceCriteria": ["issue templates + config.yml blank disabled", "PR template with checklist", "CODEOWNERS assigns @ChristopherBilg"]}
```
